notes: Cap Hit and Expertise at 7.5%, then favor Crit; match socket bonuses when they pay out. Capacitive Primal Diamond is the legendary meta from Wrathion's questline. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
